en.status.sourceUploadUnsupported: Unsupported source file. Use PDF, JPG, PNG, SVG, or WebP.
en.status.clipboardImageMissing: Clipboard does not contain a supported image. Copy a JPG, PNG, SVG, or WebP image and press Ctrl+V.
en.status.pdfUploaded: PDF uploaded. Drag on the page to draw any crop size.
en.status.imageUploaded: Image uploaded. Draw a crop area to continue.
en.status.selectPdfFirst: Select an existing PDF template first, or upload a new PDF.
en.status.newTemplateFromPdf: New template created from the selected PDF. Draw a new crop area.
en.status.cropSavedAddVariables: Crop saved. Add variables on the template canvas.
en.status.saveCropBeforeVariables: Save a crop before adding variables.
en.status.selectTemplateBeforeExport: Select a template with a saved crop before exporting.
en.status.addVariableBeforeExport: Add at least one variable before exporting.
en.status.printTabBlocked: PDF generated. Browser blocked the print tab, so allow pop-ups or use Generate PDF to download.
en.confirm.removeCrop: Remove this crop and its variables?
en.csv.savedDatasetsText: Upload multiple CSV files and choose which one to use for export.
en.csv.previewDescription: The preview will show headers and the first rows.
en.source.noTemplatesText: Upload a PDF to create your first reusable template.
en.source.allowedFormatsHint: Supported formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, SVG, WebP
en.source.setupUploadHelp: You can add a source by clicking Add source, dragging and dropping a file into this panel, or pasting an image with Ctrl+V.
en.source.dropHintSetup: Drop a source file here (PDF, JPG, PNG, SVG, WebP).
en.source.dropHintDesigner: Drop a source file to replace the current source and start a new crop.
en.designer.cropHint: Drag on the PDF to create a crop. Move or resize with corner handles.
en.designer.selectVariableToEdit: Select a variable to edit its name, key, and style.
en.print.noCsvSelectedText: Choose a CSV dataset before selecting records to print.
en.mapping.title: Create print job
en.mapping.description: Choose one template and one CSV, then drag CSV fields onto template variables.
en.mapping.noTemplateText: Create or select a template before mapping fields.
en.mapping.noCsvText: Upload or select a CSV dataset before mapping fields.
en.mapping.noVariablesText: Go to Designer and add variable boxes before mapping.
en.preview.saveCropHint: Save a crop in Designer to see the selected template here.
en.preview.printUpdatesHint: Updates when records, paper, margins, or gaps change.
en.layout.chooseWhatToPrintText: Select a print job, choose rows, then pick how the page should look.
en.templates.savedLocalText: Templates are saved locally with their PDF source, crop, and variables.
en.templates.packageHelp: Save templates as .printtpl files and upload them to reuse or share.
en.printWindow.pdfNotGenerated: PDF could not be generated. Check the original app tab for details.
en.empty.startWithPdfText: Upload a PDF to create a saved template, then crop the reusable print area.
